dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal describes a bottom pattern with upward breakout. Since specific bottom pattern detection is not available as a discrete indicator, used Donchian channel breakout as a technical proxy for bottom breakout (price crossing above recent resistance). Exit uses Donchian lower band crossing for reversal detection. Pattern historically shows 35% average rise in bull markets and 24% in bear markets, with ~28% of formations rising >45% in bull markets. The reversal classification (206 R) indicates this acts as a downtrend reversal.

source_rule_text: Bottom pattern with upward breakout acting as a reversal of downward price trend
